button.name: action_run_now
button.confirm: Run morning analysis right now (takes ~5 min)?

button.name: action_open_now
button.help: Check if any signal's entry window matches the current time and open positions

sheet.div: 🟢 Automation is ON. The pipeline runs automatically every trading day: 06:00 NL (analysis + trade) → 16:00 NL (check positions) → 20:00 NL (learn).
⚪ Automation is OFF. Enable it below to start the fully automated daily trading pipeline. You can also trigger any step manually using the buttons above.

group.div:
06:00 NL — Pre-Market — Fresh analysis: crypto + Asian pairs (AUD/USD, NZD/USD, USD/JPY)
09:00 NL — London Open — Fresh analysis: EUR/USD, GBP pairs, XAU/USD, EWG at peak European liquidity
15:00 NL — NY Open ⭐ — Fresh analysis: ALL instruments. London+NY overlap = highest volume = best signals
Every 30 min — ⏰ If a signal's entry window has arrived → position opens automatically at live price
Example: NY Open scores EUR/USD BUY 8/10 → entry time 15:30 → position opens at 15:30 NL automatically
16:30 NL — Checks all open positions → auto-closes if SL or TP hit
20:00 NL — Analyses losses → updates AI Rulebook → refreshes performance review
Weekends: all jobs skipped automatically.

Trade selection criteria:
• Signal must be BUY, STRONG BUY, SELL, or STRONG SELL
• AI score ≥ minimum score setting
• Confidence must be MEDIUM or HIGH (unless override enabled)
• No existing open position for that instrument
• Maximum positions limit not exceeded
Position sizing: Based on your Paper Trading account's Risk per Trade % setting. Set this at Daily → Paper Trading before enabling automation.
Safety: This is paper trading only — no real money. All positions are virtual. Real trading requires your own broker integration.

record.field: record = env['trading.automation'].get_singleton() action = { 'type': 'ir.actions.act_window', 'name': 'Automation', 'res_model': 'trading.automation', 'view_mode': 'form', 'res_id': record.id, 'target': 'current', } action = action
